{"status":"ok","message-type":"work","message-version":"1.0.0","message":{"indexed":{"date-parts":[[2026,6,3]],"date-time":"2026-06-03T18:18:21Z","timestamp":1780510701324,"version":"3.54.1"},"posted":{"date-parts":[[2021,9,25]]},"reference-count":0,"publisher":"Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE)","license":[{"start":{"date-parts":[[2021,9,25]],"date-time":"2021-09-25T00:00:00Z","timestamp":1632528000000},"content-version":"unspecified","delay-in-days":0,"URL":"https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/"}],"content-domain":{"domain":[],"crossmark-restriction":false},"short-container-title":[],"abstract":"<jats:p>This paper presents a method for automatic generation of a training
dataset for a deep convolutional neural network used for playing card
detection. The solution allows to skip the time-consuming processes of
manual image collecting and labelling recognised objects. The YOLOv4
network trained on the generated dataset achieved an efficiency of
99.8% in the cards detection task. The proposed method is a part of a
project that aims to automate the process of broadcasting duplicate
bridge competitions using a vision system and neural networks.</jats:p>","DOI":"10.36227/techrxiv.16676734.v1","type":"posted-content","created":{"date-parts":[[2021,9,25]],"date-time":"2021-09-25T01:43:14Z","timestamp":1632534194000},"source":"Crossref","is-referenced-by-count":0,"title":["Training dataset generation for automatic registration of a duplicate bridge game"],"prefix":"10.36227","author":[{"given":"Piotr","family":"Wzorek","sequence":"first","affiliation":[],"role":[{"vocabulary":"crossref","role":"author"}]},{"ORCID":"https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6798-4444","authenticated-orcid":false,"given":"Tomasz","family":"Kryjak","sequence":"additional","affiliation":[{"name":"AGH University of Science and Technology"}],"role":[{"vocabulary":"crossref","role":"author"}]}],"member":"263","container-title":[],"original-title":[],"link":[{"URL":"https://www.techrxiv.org/doi/pdf/10.36227/techrxiv.16676734.v1","content-type":"unspecified","content-version":"vor","intended-application":"similarity-checking"}],"deposited":{"date-parts":[[2026,6,3]],"date-time":"2026-06-03T17:45:48Z","timestamp":1780508748000},"score":1,"resource":{"primary":{"URL":"https://www.techrxiv.org/doi/full/10.36227/techrxiv.16676734.v1"}},"subtitle":[],"short-title":[],"issued":{"date-parts":[[2021,9,25]]},"references-count":0,"URL":"https://doi.org/10.36227/techrxiv.16676734.v1","relation":{},"subject":[],"published":{"date-parts":[[2021,9,25]]},"subtype":"preprint"}}
